evidence: LLDB batch mode was prepared and saved in debugging/lldb_commands.txt, but native execution failed twice on this host because debugserver is unavailable; GDB fallback also failed to read the generated DWARF. The instrumented debug binary still captures the required runtime state: after two Next() calls, second_size=7 and ByteCount()=15, yet BackUp(11) is accepted. state_capture.txt shows the buffer changing from 8 'A' bytes + 7 'B' bytes to only 4 'A' bytes, proving rollback of 4 bytes that were not part of the most recent Next() result. consume_capture.txt then shows ASan use-after-poison in google::protobuf::io::CordOutputStream::Consume().
